name: Almond Cream Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and flour. Gradually add milk while stirring continuously until the mixture thickens and becomes bubbly.
2. Cook for an additional 2 minutes. Stir in the beaten egg and yolk mixture into the hot mixture.
3. Return all ingredients to the saucepan and continue cooking while stirring gently until just boiling.
4. Remove from heat and stir until smooth. Add remaining ingredients except chocolate, then cool.
5. Spread a thin layer of filling onto one side of each mini crepe. Fold the crepes in quarters.
6. Place the filled crepes in an ungreased pan and heat uncovered at 350°F for 10 minutes.
7. Garnish with shaved chocolate.
